# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Write secure code.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          hour: 1000
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_size: 1000000

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          hour: 2000
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_size: 1000000

routes:
  - name: user-route
    service: user-service
    paths:
      - /api/users
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - https://yourdomain.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          exposed_headers:
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset

  - name: order-route
    service: order-service
    paths:
      - /api/orders
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - https://yourdomain.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          exposed_headers:
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset

plugins:
  - name: jwt
    config:
      key: your_jwt_secret
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      run_on_preflight: true
